MODULE: cosmos.mcp_server.memory_tools
FILE: cosmos/mcp_server/memory_tools.py (811 lines)
CATEGORY: mcp_server

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Memory Tools - MCP Tool Implementations for Memory Operations

Provides detailed memory access capabilities:
- Advanced search with filters
- Memory graph queries
- Working memory access
- Memory statistics
- Unified Memory API with session references

CLASSES:
- MemoryToolResult: Result from a memory tool operation.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- MemoryTools: Memory tool implementations for the MCP server.

Provides advanced memory operat

  Methods: async def advanced_recall(self, query: str, limit: int=10, min_score: float=0.3, tags_filter: Option
  Methods: async def query_knowledge_graph(self, query: str, max_entities: int=10, max_hops: int=2) -> MemoryTo
  Methods: async def get_working_memory(self, slot_name: Optional[str]=None) -> MemoryToolResult
  Methods: async def set_working_memory(self, name: str, value: Any, slot_type: str='scratch') -> MemoryToolRes
  Methods: async def get_memory_stats(self) -> MemoryToolResult
  Methods: async def trigger_dreaming(self) -> MemoryToolResult
  Methods: async def add_entity(self, name: str, entity_type: str, properties: Optional[dict]=None) -> MemoryTo
- UnifiedMemoryTools: Unified memory tools for the MCP server.

  Methods: async def get_project_context(self, project_name: str, session_id: str) -> MemoryToolResult

  Methods: async def get_unified_stats(self) -> MemoryToolResult

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
